title: STEINS;GATE
name: sg
epigraph: The universe has a beginning, but no end. — Infinite. The stars too have beginnings, but their power accompanies their decline. — Finite. It's the wise who are the most foolish. History has taught us as much. The fish of the sea know not the world of the land. Were they to possess wisdom, they too would experience decline. It is more absurd that humans should surpass the speed of light than it is that fish should start living on the land. This can be said to be God's final warning to those who resist...

title: ANONYMOUS;CODE
name: ac
epigraph: The fact that you've arrived here-rather, to this save point- at this moment in your life is nothing short of a miracle. It delights me to no end. Step through the stage's curtain; rip off the mask of the wizard who pulls the strings. Close the loop. Hack into God.
